verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Nice warmth but slightly flat shadows, less cinematic depth.

verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_muted
verdicts.reason: Restrained warmth, rich tonal depth, cinematic and premium feel.

verdicts.name: scout_cool_mid_muted
verdicts.reason: Muted cool tones, contemplative mood, slightly neutral.

verdicts.name: scout_warm_night_muted_2
verdicts.reason: Lifted blacks soften the image, good warmth but less depth.

verdicts.name: scout_green_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Green cast visible in shadows, stylised but may feel narrow.

verdicts.name: scout_neutral_night_soft
verdicts.reason: Clean but too neutral, lacks moody cinematic character.
